curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The advisory explicitly names SkipBlockProof::verify as the primary target, but the patch fixes the same unchecked BitSet-to-u16 cast pattern in TendermintProof::verify and DoubleVoteProof::verify as well. All three verify methods in skip_block.rs, tendermint.rs, and equivocation_proof.rs are listed as vulnerable locations. The multisig.rs file was not listed as a location since it only contains the newly added checked_signer_slots helper function (the fix), not vulnerable pre-patch code.
